Harnessed Soul Gem  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
Charges: Unlimited
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
INT: +6 MANA: +35
Effect: Reclaim Energy (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 10.0)
WT: 0.1 Size: SMALL
Class: MAG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Harnessed Soul Gem
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
Charges: Unlimited
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
INT: +6 MANA: +35
Effect: Reclaim Energy (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 10.0)
WT: 0.1 Size: SMALL
Class: MAG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Lore:Harnessed soul gem
Item Type:Misc
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Saze
Lucy Entry By:Tiana
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-17 00:02:10
Page Updated:Tue May 24th, 2016

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 51
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Tower of Frozen Shadow
NPC Name
The Fabled Tserrina Syl`Tor
Tserrina Syl`Tor


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Tower of Frozen Shadow


Uploaded November 27th, 2008

all this does is stops you from wasting the little bit of mana it takes to reclaim the mana with the normal spell

Focus for higher lv pets
QuoteReply
# Aug 14 2003 at 7:08 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758531810
34 posts
Never really noticed if this made my pet stronger but i did notice a slight increase in mana relaiming over instant reclaim energy. hard to justify with the castign time so high though.
For all those intereseted the foci that makes epic pet and 61+ lv pets stronger is the Gloves of dark summoning Droped off name in Vex Thal. supposed to be a rare drop but our guild got like 5 very uber makes epic as big as an ogre :) Very difficult zone which requires a full raid force for anywhere from 6 to 12 hours of streigh mob pulling and killing.
Agaloth
65 lv mage
bertoxx server

Cannot be purified
QuoteReply
# Jul 08 2002 at 1:04 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591774863337
23 posts
This item cannot be purified by means of the spirit aid quest. Just tried it.

Also it jus came to as i was reading a post. The mysterous locked mirror in the mirror room is probably this. O.k. you got the express key. You use it on the first floor on the mirror to the left. It takes you to the mirror room on the 7th floor. All the mirrors are one way this holds true on every floor. So wouldn't the "locked" mirror be the one that you came through using the key the express key Tserrina drops. I have not gotten the key yet but guildie did tonight and I will try to confirm this as soon as I can. All I have to say is DUH if it is. I hate bursting my own bubble
▲ Page top
RE: Cannot be purified
QuoteReply
# Dec 28 2002 at 5:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248257039
View User Forum
48 posts
all mirrors are one way except entrance mirror. but no mirror shows up on the opposite side. so once you go through a mirror you do not turn around and see a mirror. If what you are saying is true then there would be a blank wall not a mirror.

there is nothing on track that has not been accounted for. if the last mirror does go somewhere it it either a very long ways or it is a whole new zone.

my guess is that it was put in for the option of future expansion, but never used. kind of like the short tunnel in the north east corner of stonebrunt. even has a door you can open but it does not go anywhere.
▲ Page top
8th floor
QuoteReply
# Jul 01 2002 at 9:38 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592250732712
View User Forum
7 posts
There is no 8th floor. The key to 7th floor opens the locked door and the mirror in there ports you out to Iceclad.
▲ Page top
RE: 8th floor
QuoteReply
# Oct 28 2002 at 5:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247435153
497 posts
Correction: There is no 8th floor... *yet*

I understand that the bit-sniffers who have looked into the data files don't see an 8th floor. Fine. But, that does not preclude this last mirror being for some as-yet-unsolved quest to open an 8th floor.

Think of it this way: there's no Sleeper in ToV... until you wake him in ST. There's no 8th floor to ToFS now, but there's nothing to stop this scenario (as an example only... please understand this is just an example scenario):

Get signet ring, give it to Dain Frostreaver, get a Crystal Shadow Key. Go back, click on the mirror and get dropped into some raid-level encounter that drops yada-yada-whatever loot. Next patch Verant proclaims success of so-and-so server in opening the lost level of the ToFS, and the mirror becomes a portal (clickable only with master key) to the Plane of Shadow.

Now, Verant has been suprisingly closed-lipped about this one. I might have expected them to give the secret away before Luclin or at least PoP... why would they not? My suspicion is this: it is intended to open a plane, but Verant has seen so little interest in planes vs. easy-to-get-to places like ToV, new CT, etc that they don't see a burning need to open this one and take that much more away from the planes opened in PoP.

Once most of the servers solve the PoP epic quest, they will start pushing out some hints for unsolved quests in previous expansions.
▲ Page top
RE: 8th floor
QuoteReply
# Mar 28 2003 at 1:38 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593361411506
Sage
89 posts
sleeper isn't in ToV before or after being awakened.

At least I have never seen her in there in the north, east or west wings

# Jun 12 2002 at 9:01 AM Rating: Excellent

1 post
I got the EverQuest Trilogy and it came with a new players guid and in the guid it talked a little bit about TOFS and it is talking about a 8th lvl. And what the guid said was to use the spell Identify on any items that Tserrina drops and see what clues they give you for finding the key to the 8th lvl. I dunno about this, but yall may try it and see what you come up with. Just my 2 cents

▲ Page top
8th floor
QuoteReply
# Oct 12 2001 at 11:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757364712
33 posts
I've seen it mentioned in other post but nothing conclusive. In theory it would make sense that this item would be used to grant access to the mythical 8th floor (or maybe to a portal to somewhere else) since it is the only thing (other than the key) that drops each and every time she is killed. As far as I know there is no mage quest (mages correct me if I am wrong) that requires this item. So it would seem likely that this may be something more than it seems. Possibly an unfinished quest? A future 8th level? A portal to a future plane? Chances are it is just a nice mage item with no other hidden use, but there is always that slim chance.

Epic Focus ??
QuoteReply
# May 09 2001 at 7:08 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I have heard rumors of this being our epic pet focus. I'm working on my epic right now, and friends are always raiding ToFS so I will stop in and grab one soon. Guess the only way to find out is someone with the epic pet will have to test it. Anyone know if that ShowEQ program is still out there and working? I heard thats how you obtain exact stat info on things including differences in focused pets. Regarding the many post about getting back more mana from Monster Summoning line with the HSGem, try it with any of your other focus items, you will always gain back more mana than you expend, its not a special ability of the gem that Tserinna drops, its all reclaim energy items. I can stand up indefintiely casting MS2 and reclaiming and be at FM after each reclaim, and my specialization is Evocation, not conjuration.
▲ Page top
RE: Epic Focus ??
QuoteReply
# Jul 02 2001 at 11:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760621109
1 post
It is the foci for the Monster Summoning Line. Some summoned monsters will appear larger when this is equipped as they are cast. (Spiders will be the size of large spiders (not giant) and orcs will grow from the size of pawns to the size of centurions.
▲ Page top
Tower Levels
QuoteReply
# Apr 29 2001 at 7:25 PM Rating: Excellent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
There are 7 levels in the tower - per the designer of the tower, level 6 is split in two (6a and 6b with a mirror between NOT needing a key, but the theme is same, and there's a return mirror to 6a under ramp of 6b). Also, Tserrina's Key is a master to the LEFT mirror on level 1, takes you to a 6 mirror room on level 7 (Tserrina's level). The door near the mirrors is locked, can be picked 201 skill OR use key from level 6 to 7 to open it and gain access to the spiral stairs near Tserrina. The rightmost of the 6 mirrors is being kept "unworking" for now (try it, it responds slightly differently than the other mirrors) for future expansion in the game and storyline (again - per conversation with developer on Test server one day).

FYI, we've killed Tserrina 7 times now, 3 whips, 3 symbols, 1 staff, no robes (cry), but she dropped both her shortcut key, and the mage only handheld item every time.
▲ Page top
RE: Tower Levels
QuoteReply
# Oct 12 2001 at 11:43 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757364712
33 posts
Door is pickable with a 200 skill (not sure if it is lower or not, but I do know that a rogue will a pick lock skill of 200 can do it.)
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 12 2001 at 11:17 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post)
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 12 2001 at 11:17 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post)
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 12 2001 at 11:17 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post)
Effect !
QuoteReply
# Mar 11 2001 at 9:15 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245623402
6 posts
I received this item recently, and made a few tests with it. This is not a focus item (at least doesn't sem to be), but the effect on it is not the regular reclaim energy we are used to (the one from sol ro focus items and from the 3 staves).
The casting time of the reclaim energy on harnessed soul gem is 8 seconds, but it gives back ALL the mana that the pet costed (tested with MS II, I summoned 20 MSII and killed them and was still FM, though I had no clarity and was standing).
This looks great for chaincasting =). I haven 't tested the range yet. Anyone has one of the mage vellious armor bracers? They might have the same effect i guess.
Also, i was wondering, is 8th level of TFS already in game? Read someone s post about the harnessed soul gem being used as a quest item to access lvl 8, just below.. I thought only the key from tserrina was needed but that the level was not yet created..

Ektarot, mage 55, Mithaniel Marr.
▲ Page top
RE: Effect !
QuoteReply
# Apr 12 2001 at 11:19 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Just a little info from my own experiences: Before I ever got this item from the tower, I think I was lvl 48 at the time, I noticed that if my pet was at full health and used the Ro focus item I would gain a bit more mana back than used in summoning a pet. I think it took about 8 pets and reclaim energys to get around a bubble of mana. Maybe a little more efficient than meditating, but not worth the components this require you to carry around. I have since tried this with both the Ro focus item and harnessed soul gem and believe that this no longer works. At least it didn't work the last time I tried it.


Wrathcall
52 Magi
▲ Page top
RE: Effect !
QuoteReply
# Mar 13 2001 at 9:41 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
BTW, i am speced in evo, but i guess if speced in conjuration this item would allow you to regain some mana by just casting pets then using it.
Alas, if my estimations are correct, with 225+ in spec conj, you wil use half mana once every three pets. With pet costing 350 mana, that'll make 175 mana regained every (10+8)*3 = 54 secs of casting time, so not really interesting as a mana regen item ;).

Ektarot, mage 55, Mith Marr.

RE: Could this be?
QuoteReply
# Jan 22 2001 at 5:46 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Personally, I think this IS a focus item for the higher level mage pets. Initial focus items only worked up to level 50. I just turned 50, got this item, and summoned a 49th level earth pet. It may just be my imagination, but seemed to me that my pet had seemed to have be hastened. Attacks were doubled and damaged dealt, went from the 150's, to in upwards of 250-200. My pet also ran around like it had sow cast upon it. I'm not for certain, but I will continue using this gem instead of my regular focus items.
